Comparison.title: Why We Are Worth It
Comparison.subtitle: Because we provide results and service far beyond typical providers.
Comparison.old2Sub: You have no idea what's being worked on.
Comparison.old4Sub: Hard to customize and prone to security leaks.
Comparison.new1Sub: The agreed price is exactly what you pay.
Comparison.new2Sub: Monitor progress every day via Dashboard.
Comparison.new3Sub: 100% ownership of your application code from day one.
Comparison.new4Sub: Built from scratch specifically for your business needs.

ProductCatalog.title: Strategic Solutions
ProductCatalog.subtitle: Tailored engagement models for digital transformation.

Solutions.title: Digital Solutions to Grow Your Business.
Solutions.subtitle: We build custom websites, database systems, and custom apps to increase sales and automate daily operations.

web.title: Premium Websites & Marketing Engines
web.target: Company Profile, Landing Page, Corporate Blog, Content Marketing, Online Store, Pro Portfolio, Media Hub, Campaign Microsite, Education Web, News Portal, Digital Catalog, Event Page, Brand Activation
web.desc: Build a premium company profile website or custom online store to attract clients, build trust, and drive sales. No WordPress templates.

app.title: Business Apps & Internal Systems
app.target: Internal System, Custom Dashboard, SaaS Platform, Business Automation, Custom CRM, Inventory System, Member Portal, Management Tool, API Integration, Booking System, Payroll App, Logistics Tracking, Analytic Dashboard
app.desc: Build custom inventory tracking, booking systems, CRMs, or client portals to automate tasks, eliminate manual paperwork, and save time.

security.title: System Security & Cloud Maintenance
security.target: Enterprise Brand, High-Traffic Site, AI-Ready SEO, Cybersecurity, Anti-DDoS, Data Protection, GEO Optimization, Search Generative AI, Bot Protection, Cloud Security, Database Encryption, Security Audit
security.desc: Keep your system online 24/7, protect client databases from hackers, and optimize your business for modern AI search engines.

Workflow.title: Honest Work Process
Workflow.subtitle: Track your project's progress in real-time through the Client Dashboard. Transparent, fast, and outcome-focused.
Workflow.step1Desc: Discuss your business goals with us. We will map out a detailed feature list and clear timeline for your project.
Workflow.step2Desc: Receive a guaranteed fixed price with no hidden costs. Pay a secure initial deposit to start the work.
Workflow.step3Desc: Track progress on your dashboard. Need changes? Just click where you want to edit. We do the work, you launch.

Financial.title: What is Often Overlooked.
Financial.subtitle: Why waste months trying to build an in-house development team when you can launch instantly?
Financial.salaryNew: Pay Only for What You Actually Need
Financial.comp4New: Hands-off for you, we manage everything.
Financial.comp5Old: Costs for laptops, software keys, office space.

Guarantee.title: We Take On All The Risk.
Guarantee.subtitle:
100% Money Back Guarantee
During Briefing Phase
Guarantee.desc: We are very confident in our hybrid system. If after the AI briefing session and receiving the initial Blueprint you feel it doesn't fit our approach, we will refund your deposit 100%.
Guarantee.footer: No questions asked. No drama. You still get to keep the AI-generated Blueprint analysis.

CustomCTA.title: Need a Specific Solution?
CustomCTA.description: If you have specific service requirements not listed in our standard packages, use our price calculator for an instant estimate or contact us directly.

Expert.name: {brand} Team
Expert.description: Every business has a unique DNA, and so do the systems they need. We build infrastructure from scratch with the highest industry standards for clean code and security. Our focus is singular: providing you with a solid and fast digital foundation to sustain long-term business growth.

ClientDashboard.title:
Absolute Transparency via 
<yellow>Strategic Dashboard</yellow>
ClientDashboard.description: Experience full transparency in building your website and applications. The Client Dashboard displays every progress of your project openly and in real-time.

dailyUpdates.title: Daily Progress Updates
dailyUpdates.desc: Monitor your project's development every day. Every milestone and update is clearly logged in your activity feed.

comms.title: Direct Communication
comms.desc: Reach our development team easily at any time. All discussions are organized in one place so no message gets lost.

issues.title: Revisions & Fixes
issues.desc: Review, comment on, and track the resolution of any revision requests or project roadblocks openly.

specs.title: Project Scope & Planning
specs.desc: Your detailed feature list is always accessible. Know exactly what we are building for you at any stage.

docs.title: Document Storage
docs.desc: One place for all your project documents, from design files and handoff guides to invoices.

status.title: Progress Status
status.desc: Monitor the current stage of your project. Instantly see if we are in design, coding, or ready to launch.

Philosophy.title: Why We Don't Do <red>Calls</red>
Philosophy.desc: Traditional calls kill momentum. We replace inefficient meetings with absolute documentation to respect your time.
Philosophy.stat1: Managers/staff get distracted from core business tasks
Philosophy.way1: Documented Decisions. No "he said, she said". Written in stone.
Philosophy.way2: Async by Default. Respond when ready, not when calendar dictates.
Philosophy.way3: Visual Updates. Don't ask about design or layout status, view the live progress directly on your dashboard.
Philosophy.way4: Emergency Only. We only meet if strategy needs a massive pivot.

Cta.title: Designed for Corporate Oversight
Cta.desc: Our dashboard provides the full transparency you need to monitor the progress of your business project securely and conveniently.

FAQ.title: Have Doubts?
FAQ.subtitle: We know you have many questions. Let's cover everything here so you can move forward with confidence.
FAQ.a1: Our platform is optimized for Asynchronous Communication to ensure precision and absolute documentation. However, for critical coordination or deep strategic consulting, scheduled Premium Call sessions are available.
FAQ.a2: All projects include a 90-Day Performance Warranty. Bug reports are prioritized within your dashboard to ensure zero disruption to your business operations.
FAQ.q3: Who retains ownership of the source code?
FAQ.a3: Your organization retains 100% full ownership. Upon project completion, all technical assets and GitHub repositories are transferred to your corporate control.
FAQ.q4: What is the procedure for scope adjustments?
FAQ.a4: We operate with full transparency. Minor adjustments are handled within active iterations, while significant scope changes are managed as supplemental missions to keep the primary timeline predictable.
FAQ.q5: What technology standards do you follow?
FAQ.a5: We standardize on high-performance stacks like Next.js & TypeScript. Our Senior Systems Architects are equipped to adapt to your existing enterprise infrastructure as required.
FAQ.q6: Can you integrate with third-party enterprise systems?
FAQ.a6: Absolutely. We routinely integrate with industrial-grade APIs and cloud services such as Stripe, SAP, Google Cloud, and various custom internal gateways.
FAQ.a7: We take intellectual property seriously. We are ready to sign your company's standard NDA before any code is written.
FAQ.a8: We use a milestone-based payment system. You only release funds when a specific deliverable is approved on your dashboard.
FAQ.a9: Yes, we offer retainer packages for ongoing feature development, security updates, and infrastructure monitoring.
FAQ.q10: How long does a typical project take?
FAQ.a10: Most MVPs are delivered in 4-8 weeks. Enterprise migrations may take 3-6 months depending on complexity.
FAQ.q11: Why is the price more expensive than a freelancer?
FAQ.a11: Because you are paying for certainty. We provide a professional team and a guarantee of code that won't break when traffic spikes.
FAQ.q12: Do I get access to the source code?
FAQ.a12: Yes. From the moment the contract is signed, all the code we write is your company's asset.
FAQ.a13: We provide a free bug fix guarantee for the first 90 days after launch.
FAQ.a14: CredibleMark has been actively providing strategic digital solutions since 2013.
FAQ.q15: How much investment is required for a project?
FAQ.a15: Investment is tailored to the scale and complexity of the system you need. We focus on long-term quality, not just cheap pricing. Detailed price estimates for each service model can be found on the Service page.
FAQ.q16: What are the dominant features of CredibleMark compared to other website builders?
FAQ.a16: Our main advantages are **Total Transparency** (real-time Dashboard), **Full Ownership** (Source code belongs to you), **No Hidden Fees**, as well as premium and modern **Coding Results and UI** quality.
FAQ.q17: How long does a project typically take?
FAQ.a17: For a ready-to-use initial version (MVP), we usually complete it within a minimum of 4 weeks depending on the complexity of the features.
FAQ.a18: We provide professional website development, complex web applications (internal systems, CRM, SaaS), cybersecurity, and integrating your systems with other services like WhatsApp or payment gateways.
FAQ.q19: What is the advantage of having a website over a marketplace?
FAQ.a19: With your own website, you have full control over customer data, are free from third-party commission fees, and can build a much more exclusive and professional brand.
FAQ.q20: How can I make money through CredibleMark?
FAQ.a20: In addition to building systems that automate your business, you can also earn extra income by joining our Affiliate Program through this link: https://crediblemark.com/affiliate/join

Included.title: Everything Included, Right From Day One.
Included.subtitle: {brand} delivers a complete, enterprise-grade foundation — not a barebones template you need to patch together.
Included.f1Desc: Every pixel perfected on any device. Your product works flawlessly on phone, tablet, and desktop — zero compromise.
Included.f2Desc: Built for discoverability. Fast load times, structured data, and clean markup so Google ranks your product higher.
Included.f3Desc: SSL, rate limiting, input sanitization, and OWASP standards baked in from the start. No security as an afterthought.
Included.f4Desc: Interfaces that convert. Every screen is crafted to guide users toward actions that grow your business.
Included.f5Desc: Comprehensive handoff docs, API references, and architecture diagrams. Your team can take over with confidence.
Included.f6Desc: 90-day warranty period for bug fixes. We don't disappear after delivery — we stay until your system is stable.
